summary: Complete testing of Files & Documents Management Module. Fixed a critical backend bug (Form parameter annotation) and all 23 backend tests pass. Frontend UI testing shows all modals, filters, and interactions working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/document-categories - List categories returns 200 with categories array
GET /api/documents/{id} - Get document with file data for download - 200
DELETE /api/documents/{id} - Uploader can delete their document - 200
DELETE /api/document-categories - Cannot delete category with documents - 400
Frontend: Files & Documents page loads correctly at /files-documents
Frontend: Manage Categories button visible for key users (Director role)
Frontend: Add Category modal - form inputs and Create button work
Frontend: Add Subcategory modal - parent select and form work
Frontend: Upload Document modal - all fields visible and functional
Frontend: Category filter dropdown shows all categories
Frontend: Search input accepts and clears text
Frontend: Success toasts appear for category/subcategory creation

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Document upload endpoint was not receiving form data correctly
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Changed function parameters from 'name: str = None' to 'name: str = Form(None)' and added Form import from fastapi

critical_code_review_comments: KEY_USER_ROLES properly includes 'admin', 'Admin', 'CEO', 'Director' for category management permissions
5 MB file size limit correctly enforced in backend (MAX_FILE_SIZE constant)
Allowed document types properly validated: PDF, DOC, DOCX, PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, WEBP
File stored as base64 in MongoDB - consider GridFS for larger deployments
Delete permissions correctly check both uploader and key user roles
Category deletion correctly prevents deletion when documents exist
All data-testid attributes present for testing: files-documents-page, manage-categories-btn, add-category-btn, add-subcategory-btn, upload-document-btn, category-filter, search-documents-input
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing was cleaned up. Existing data: Sales Materials category with Brochures subcategory
context_for_next_testing_agent: Files & Documents module fully tested. Backend endpoints at /api/document-categories, /api/document-subcategories, /api/documents. Key test-ids: files-documents-page, manage-categories-btn, upload-document-btn, category-filter, search-documents-input, add-category-btn, category-name-input, category-submit-btn, upload-doc-name, upload-category-select, upload-submit-btn. Form data upload fixed - requires Form() annotation for parameters.
rca_of_the_issue: The document upload endpoint was failing because FastAPI requires Form() annotation for parameters sent as multipart/form-data. The original code used plain type hints (str = None) which work for JSON body requests but not for form data. Fixed by importing Form from fastapi and annotating parameters as Form(None).
